name: Turen Naur

sheet.name: Turen Naur
sheet.background_story:
After seeing the glorious battle of Church of Her, Turen wants to live his own adventure, he has decided to join the second raid that will try to sail The Burrow. 

He also wouldn't mind taking some loot with him during his expedition into the depths. 

Died at the Depths fighting Molosh, he helped kill it with the spear before succumbing to his wounds.

description:
After seeing the glorious battle of Church of Her, Turen wants to live his own adventure, he has decided to join the second raid that will try to sail The Burrow. 

He also wouldn't mind taking some loot with him during his expedition into the depths. 

Died at the Depths fighting Molosh, he helped kill it with the spear before succumbing to his wounds.
